# GDS Marriage Links

> India's trusted premium matrimonial platform for serious marriage seekers.

## About
GDS Marriage Links is a premium Indian matrimonial platform connecting families and individuals seeking life partners. With 15+ years of service, we offer verified profiles, smart AI-powered matching, real-time messaging, and privacy-first features across all Indian communities and states.

## Services
- Matrimonial matchmaking with verified profiles
- AI-powered compatibility matching
- Real-time messaging between matched profiles
- Profile verification (identity, education, employment)
- Privacy controls (hide profile, photo protection)
- Family-friendly profile creation (for self, son, daughter, sibling, friend)

## Membership Plans
- Basic: INR 2,557/month (10 interests/day, 10 contact views)
- Silver: INR 7,669/3 months (20 interests/day, see profile viewers)
- Gold: INR 10,619/6 months (50 interests/day, direct messaging, profile boosts) — Most Popular
- Platinum: INR 12,979/12 months (unlimited interests, premium support, featured badge)

All prices include 18% GST. Free registration available.

## Communities Served
Hindu, Muslim, Christian, Sikh, Jain, Buddhist, Parsi, Jewish — with caste and sub-community preferences.

## Coverage
All Indian states and union territories. Also serving the global Indian diaspora.

## Target Audience
- Indian men and women aged 18+ seeking marriage
- Parents and family members searching for matches
- NRI (Non-Resident Indian) community

## Contact
- Website: https://gdsmarriagelinks.com
- Email: support@gdsmarriagelinks.com
- Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India
- Hours: Mon-Sat, 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM IST
